name: Ambika Sanwa
profileSummary: Ambika Sanba was born on March 17, 1937 in Khokling, Mikwakhola, Taplejung District. He was a Nepalese politician. He was elected to the Pratinidhi Sabha for two terms in 1991 and 1994election, as the Communist Party of Nepal candidate in the Taplejung-2 constituency for 8years.
